title: Dragon pickaxe
wikitext:
{{External|rs}} {{Otheruses|the dragon pickaxe}} {{Infobox Item |name = Dragon pickaxe |image = [[File:Dragon pickaxe.png]] |release = [[13 March]] [[2014]] |update = Rejuvenating the Wilderness: More risk, more reward |aka = Dpick |members = Yes |quest = No |tradeable = Yes |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = Yes |options = Wield, Drop |examine = If rocks could feel fear, they'd fear this. |value = 97950 |weight = 2.400 |exchange = Yes |id = 11920 |leagueRegion = Desert,Wilderness,Misthalin }} [[File:Dragon pickaxe detail.png|left|140px]] The '''dragon pickaxe''' is the second strongest and second fastest [[pickaxe]] in-game, tied with the [[3rd age pickaxe]] and behind the [[crystal pickaxe]]. It requires 61 [[Mining]] to mine with the pickaxe and 60 [[Attack]] to wield it. However, as its [[special attack]] temporarily boosts the player's Mining level by 3, players with at least 60 Attack can start mining with the pickaxe at 58 Mining. Excluding waiting for ores to respawn or having to move to a new resource, the dragon pickaxe is effectively a 5.88% increase in overall mining speed compared to a [[rune pickaxe]]. By default, the dragon pickaxe provides a chance to mine an ore every three ticks, and there is an additional 1/6 chance to reduce this to two ticks,{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/881966993968181248|date=3 July 2017|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/104266|archivedate=28 May 2020|quote=The dragon [pickaxe] has a 1/6 chance to reduce the delay by a tick, yes.}} leading to an average of 2.83 ticks per roll. ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = +38 |aslash = -2 |acrush = +32 |amagic = 0 |arange = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = +1 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |str = +42 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = 0 |slot = weapon |speed = 5 |attackrange = 1 |combatstyle = Pickaxe |image = [[File:Dragon pickaxe equipped male.png|150px]] |altimage = [[File:Dragon pickaxe equipped female.png|155px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Pickaxe|speed=5|attackrange=1}} ==Special attack== [[File:Rock Knocker.gif|frame|A player performs the Dragon pickaxe's special attack, ''Rock Knocker''.]] The dragon pickaxe's [[special attack]], ''Rock Knocker'', temporarily boosts the player's [[Mining]] level by 3 (players will need to have 60 [[Attack]] to utilise this special). This consumes 100% of the player's [[special attack energy]]. The boost degrades every 60 seconds, with your Mining level returning to normal after 3 minutes. This effect is useful to increase the chance of successful rolls or to meet a Mining level requirement above the player's base level. When used alongside the [[Lightbearer]] ring, special attack energy regenerates twice as fast, making it viable to consistently mine rocks 1-2 levels higher than base. Note that any levels boosted above 99 with the special attack will be treated as 99. Therefore, you will start to receive diminishing returns with the special attack at level 97 and 98, with there being no value in using the special at level 99.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1375844352098975753|date=27 March 2021|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/98237|archivedate=29 March 2021}} ==Creation== {{Recipe |facilities = Nurmof |members = Yes |ticks = |mat1 = Dragon pickaxe (broken) |mat1cost = 0 |mat2 = Coins |mat2quantity = 2500000 |mat2cost = 1 |output1 = Dragon pickaxe }} ==Upgrading== [[File:Smouldering stone.gif|frame|A player uses a smouldering stone to create an infernal pickaxe.]] Players can combine a [[smouldering stone]] with a dragon pickaxe to create an [[infernal pickaxe]], requiring 85 [[Smithing]] (boosts not allowed) to do so. This process '''cannot''' be undone. The infernal pickaxe will grant the player a 1/3 chance to disintegrate ores for Smithing experience whilst mining. The infernal pickaxe will be able to disintegrate 5,000 ores before degrading, requiring another smouldering stone or dragon pickaxe to charge it. The effect cannot be toggled. Players can also create a [[crystal pickaxe]] via a [[singing bowl]] by combining a dragon pickaxe, 120 [[crystal shard]]s and a [[crystal tool seed]]. This requires level 76 [[Smithing]] and [[Crafting]], which can be [[Temporary skill boost|boosted]]. If players cannot create it on their own, they can have [[Conwenna]] or [[Reese]] sing the crystal for them for an extra 60 crystal shards, for a total of 180. Lastly, players can use a [[dragon pickaxe upgrade kit]], [[Trailblazer tool ornament kit]], or [[Zalcano shard]] to cosmetically enhance their dragon pickaxes, creating a [[dragon pickaxe (upgraded)]], [[Dragon pickaxe (or) (Trailblazer)]], or [[dragon pickaxe (or)]], respectively. This only alters its appearance and makes the pickaxe untradeable. The process can be reverted, but the dragon pickaxe upgrade kit will not be retained while the Trailblazer kit and shard will be. ==Products== {{Uses material list|Dragon pickaxe}} ==Item sources== {{Drop sources|Dragon pickaxe}} ==Treasure Trails== {{EmoteClueHeader}} {{EmoteClue|tier=master|emote=Spin|location=West of the [[Soul Altar]]|item1=Dragon pickaxe|item2=helm of neitiznot|item3=rune boots}} {{EmoteClueBottom}} ==Used in recommended equipment== {{Used in recommended equipment|Dragon pickaxe}} ==Transcript== {{hastranscript|item}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 25 January 2023 |update = Wilderness Boss Rework |poll = Wilderness Boss Rework rewards |change = *[[Nurmof]] will now make a Dragon pickaxe when presented with 2,500,000 GP and a [[Dragon pickaxe (broken)|broken Dragon pickaxe]], obtained from the [[Volcanic mine]]. *The [[Kalphite Queen]] will now also drop the Dragon pickaxe at a rate of 1/400. *The [[King Black Dragon]]'s Dragon pickaxe drop rate has been increased from 1/1,500 to 1/1,000. }} {{Subject changes |date = 24 January 2019 |update = Boxing Mechanics and Lots of Fixes |change = The inventory model of the dragon pickaxe has been [[graphical updates|slightly adjusted]] to be consistent with all other pickaxes. }} {{Subject changes |date = 18 December 2014 |update = Christmas 2014 |change = The dragon pickaxe special attack animation no longer activates when you don't have enough energy. }} {{Subject changes |date = 13 March 2014 |update = Rejuvenating the Wilderness: More risk, more reward |poll = Old School feature poll 15: Rejuvenating the Wilderness |change = The King Black Dragon and Chaos Elemental have had their drop tables improved and both have a chance of dropping the dragon pickaxe. detail.png|center|300x150px]] |- |[[File:Dragon pickaxe v1.png|center]] |[[File:Dragon pickaxe.png|center]] |- |13 March 2014 –
24 January 2019 |24 January 2019 –
present |} ==Trivia== *When the [[special attack]] is used, the player will exclaim {{Overhead|Smashing!}}. This pun has a double meaning, as it's a somewhat old-fashioned British expression meaning 'very good' or 'wonderful', while also referring to breaking rocks. *Prior to [[Update:Optional Randoms & Goblins|an update]] on [[11 September]] [[2014]] making [[random events]] optional, the dragon pickaxe was the only pickaxe whose [[pickaxe head]] did not fly off its handle. ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Pickaxe}} {{Dragon equipment}} [[Category:Weapons with Special attacks]] [[Category:Items subject to Grand Exchange item sink]] [[Category:Forced speech]] [[Category:Collection log items]] [[Category:Temporary skill boost]] [[Category:Mining boosting items]]
